\tzpentry{ID3489}{Concept Clusters Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3489 introduces Concept Clusters Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ i\hbar\dot\Psi_j = \left(\varepsilon_j + \alpha_j a_j + \beta_{jj}|\Psi_j|^2 + \sum_{k\ne j}\beta_{jk}|\Psi_k|^2 - i\Gamma_j\right)\Psi_j + S_j. \]
